overview: The Department of Marketing at Daffodil International University is highly respected both locally and globally for its exceptional student satisfaction. The department is a hub of innovation, dedicated to shaping the future business leaders and professionals through a variety of courses, workshops, and seminars tailored to the modern marketing and digital marketing landscapes.
waiver_info: Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota
eligibility: Students having a minimum GPA of 2.5 in SSC and HSC or equivalent background from any group may apply for admission in the BBA in Marketing. Completing GCE O'Level subjects and at least two A'Level subjects (at least GPA 2.0) are also considered for admission. Candidates who have completed higher secondary education (12 years of schooling) and proficiency in English are eligible to apply. Candidates with break of study more than two years are eligible to apply subject to pre-requisite study for break of study.
curriculum_highlights: Introduction to Sales and Retail Management
Personal Selling and Sales Force Management
intake: Spring: Jan-Apr | Summer: May-Aug | Fall: Sep-Dec
